ingredients.text: Lactic acid esters of mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids

ingredients_text: Strawberry Mousse 88% [Whole Milk, Strawberry Puree 8.8%, Sugar, Cream (from Milk), Skimmed Milk Powder, Pork Gelatine, Glucose Fructose Syrup, Acidity Regulators (Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxyde), Modified Maize Starch, Emulsifier (Lactic acid esters of mono - and diglycerides of fatty acids), Thickeners (Locust Bean Gum, Guar Gum), Flavouring, Fruit and Vegetable Concentrates (apple, blackcurrant, radish)], Strawberry Sauce 12% [Water, Sugar, Strawberry Puree 0.6%, Modified Maize Starch, Cream Powder (from Milk), Thickeners (Pectin, Guar Gum), Natural Flavouring, Acidity Regulators (Citric Acid, Trisodium Citrate), Colour (Carmine)].
product_name: Ski Fruit Mousse Strawberry & Strawberry Coulis 4X60g
